items.title: Heavy rains and flooding kills at least 23 in Nairobi
items.dek: Flights in and out of Nairobi Airport have been disrupted while some roads in the capital are submerged.
items.body: Flights in and out of Nairobi Airport have been disrupted while some roads in the capital are submerged.
